THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF PARTIES AND ORDER OF THE COURT AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 7/14/16. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MY JANE T. CHEN OR DEFENDANTS HOME DEPOT U.S.A., INC. & LG ELECTRONICS U.S.A. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,926.38 FILED BY CHEN, MY JANE T AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT U.S.A., INC. LG ELECTRONICS U.S.A. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-11-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MY JANE T. CHEN & DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVE YAO LI, SERVICE TECHNICIAN FOR HOME DEPOT U.S.A., INC. & LG ELECTRONICS, U.S.A., INC. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER AMY LO ASSISTED MS. CHEN AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. PLAINTIFF HAS GIVEN DEFENDANTS THE ORIGINAL GENERAL RELEASE IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANTS TO PROCESS PAYMENT OF $1,936.38. DEFENDANT SHALL PICK-UP THE DRYER AND PAY PLAINTIFF WITHIN THREE WEEKS. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
